map.islandDesc: Read with focus — one line at a time!
map.bayDesc: Letters get colors to help you tell them apart!
map.blocksDesc: Play with sounds and build words!
map.factoryDesc: Build words with sounds and letters!
map.intro: Move across the scene to light up the harbor, island, bay, valley, and beach, then jump straight into each reading activity.

mascot.welcome: Hi there! I'm Lumi, your reading buddy! Let's explore the Reading Planet together!
mascot.uploadHint: Want to read something? Upload a book and I'll help you read it!
mascot.readingStart: Great choice! Let's start reading. I'll be right here if you need help!
mascot.tryAgain: Almost there! Let's try once more!
mascot.goodbye: Great job today! See you tomorrow!

library.title: Bookshelf Harbor
library.subtitle: Your reading collection
library.empty: No books yet! Upload your first book to start reading.
library.deleteConfirm: Remove this book from your shelf?

upload.title: Upload a Book
upload.success: Your book is ready to read!

error.tooLarge: This file is too big! Please try a smaller file (max 20MB).
error.unsupported: Oops! I can only read PDF and TXT files.
error.empty: This file seems empty. Try another one!
error.generic: Something went wrong. Let's try again!

progress.complete: You finished the whole text! Amazing!

detective.title: Letter Detective
detective.instruction: Find all the '{letter}' letters! Tap them to mark!
detective.complete: You found them all! Great detective work!

feedback.finished: You did it! So proud of you! 🎉
